content_blocks.text:
## 3. Definitions

For the purposes of this Policy, the following terms shall have the meanings ascribed below. Where a term is defined under PMLA, PML Rules, or the 2026 FIU-IND Guidelines, the statutory or regulatory definition shall prevail and is reproduced or referenced below.

**"AECs" or "Anonymity-Enhancing Crypto Tokens"** means crypto-tokens or VDAs designed to conceal or obfuscate the origin, ownership, or value of transactions, dealings in which are not permissible within the Company's risk-mitigation framework in accordance with Paragraph 7.4 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"AML/CFT/CPF"** means Anti-Money Laundering, Counter-Financing of Terrorism, and Counter-Proliferation Financing, collectively referring to the regulatory framework targeting the prevention and detection of money laundering, terrorist financing, and proliferation financing.

**"Beneficial Owner"** means the natural person who ultimately owns or controls a customer, or the natural person on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted, including those persons who exercise ultimate effective control over a juridical person or arrangement. The beneficial owner is to be identified and verified in accordance with Rule 9(3) of the PML Rules.

**"Beneficiary"** means the customer or counterparty identified by the originator as the receiver of a VDA transfer, as referenced under Paragraph 5.3 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"Board"** means the Board of Directors of {firm_name}.

**"CDD" or "Client Due Diligence"** means the process of identifying and verifying the identity of a client, including the beneficial owner where applicable, developing a client risk profile, conducting ongoing due diligence on the business relationship, and updating client information, as required under Rule 9 of the PML Rules and elaborated under Chapter 4 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"CERT-In"** means the Indian Computer Emergency Response Team established under Section 70B of the Information Technology Act, 2000.

**"Company" or "RE" or "Reporting Entity"** means {firm_name}, an entity registered with FIU-IND as a Reporting Entity pursuant to Section 2(1)(wa) of PMLA, by virtue of being a VDA SP carrying on activities notified vide Ministry of Finance Notification dated March 7, 2023.

**"Designated Director" or "DD"** means the person designated by the Reporting Entity who is responsible for ensuring overall compliance with the obligations imposed under Chapter IV of the PMLA and the PML Rules, as defined in Rule 2(1)(ba) of the PML Rules and as further elaborated under Paragraph 3.1 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"Enhanced Measures under CDD"** means measures and procedures more rigorous and robust than standard CDD, applied on the basis of materiality and risk in accordance with Paragraph 4.4 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"FINGate"** means the FIU-IND online portal used by Reporting Entities for registration, communications, and submission of reports.

**"FIU-IND"** means the Financial Intelligence Unit – India, the central national agency of the Government of India responsible for receiving, processing, analysing, and disseminating information relating to suspect financial transactions, established by Office Memorandum dated November 18, 2004.

**"Group"** has the meaning assigned to it in Rule 2(1)(cba) of the PML Rules.

**"ICO"** means Initial Coin Offering, and **"ITO"** means Initial Token Offering, referring to means of raising funds for projects through the issuance of VDAs, as discussed under Paragraph 7.1 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"LEAs"** means Law Enforcement Agencies.

**"ML"** means Money Laundering. "Money-laundering" has the meaning assigned to it under Section 3 of PMLA, namely, directly or indirectly attempting to indulge or knowingly assisting or being a party to, or being actually involved in, any process or activity connected with the proceeds of crime and projecting it as untainted property.

**"Non-Profit Organisation" or "NPO"** has the meaning assigned to it under Rule 2(1)(cf) of the PML Rules.

**"ODD" or "Ongoing Due Diligence"** means the continuous examination and scrutiny of client transactions to determine consistency with the Reporting Entity's knowledge of the client, in accordance with Rule 9(12) of the PML Rules and Paragraph 5.1 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"Originator"** means the client who instructs a VDA transfer from a wallet or account held with a Reporting Entity, as referenced under Paragraph 5.3 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"PACT"** means Partner Accreditation for Compliance and Trust, a certification arrangement between FIU-IND-registered VDA SPs as referenced under Paragraph 2.4(g) of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"PAN"** means Permanent Account Number issued by the Indian Income Tax Department.

**"PEP" or "Politically Exposed Person"** has the meaning assigned to it under Rule 2(1)(db) of the PML Rules, including individuals entrusted with prominent public functions in India or a foreign country and their immediate family members and close associates.

**"PF"** means Proliferation Financing, namely the financing of the proliferation of weapons of mass destruction and their delivery systems.

**"PMLA"** means the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002, as amended from time to time.

**"PML Rules" or "PMLR"** means the Prevention of Money-Laundering (Maintenance of Records) Rules, 2005, as amended from time to time.

**"PO" or "Principal Officer"** means the officer designated by the Reporting Entity, being at the management level and preferably not below the level of Head of Audit/Compliance/Risk, responsible for ensuring implementation of and compliance with the obligations imposed under Chapter IV of the PMLA and the PML Rules, as defined in Rule 2(1)(f) of the PML Rules and as further elaborated under Paragraphs 3.2 and 3.3 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"RBA" or "Risk-Based Approach"** means the methodology under which the Reporting Entity identifies, assesses, and understands its ML/TF/PF risks and applies controls proportionate to those risks.

**"Red Flag Indicators" or "RFIs"** means predefined indicators triggered by potentially suspicious activity, in accordance with Paragraph 5.5.2 of the 2026 Guidelines and guidance issued by FIU-IND from time to time.

**"Sanctions Lists"** includes lists maintained pursuant to UNSCRs, designations under UAPA, designations under WMDA, and any other applicable sanctions designations.

**"STR" or "Suspicious Transaction Report"** means a report filed with FIU-IND in respect of any transaction (including attempted transaction) that gives rise to a reasonable ground of suspicion that it may involve proceeds of crime, terrorist financing, or proliferation financing, in the form and manner prescribed under Rule 3(1)(D), Rule 7(2), and Rule 8(2) of the PML Rules.

**"TF"** means Terrorist Financing.

**"Travel Rule"** means the obligations under Rule 4 of the PML Rules and Paragraph 5.3 of the 2026 Guidelines on Reporting Entities involved in VDA transfers to obtain, hold, and transmit required originator and beneficiary information, consistent with FATF Recommendation 16.

**"Tumbler" or "Mixer"** means a service or product that obscures the link between deposit and withdrawal of VDAs, dealings in which are not permissible within the Company's risk-mitigation framework in accordance with Paragraph 7.5 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"UAPA"** means the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967, including designations of terrorists and terrorist organisations made thereunder.

**"Unhosted Wallet"** means a VDA wallet that is not hosted by a Reporting Entity, typically a self-custodial wallet, as referenced under Paragraph 7.2 of the 2026 Guidelines.

**"UNSCRs"** means United Nations Security Council Resolutions, particularly those relating to suppression and combating of terrorism, terrorist financing, and proliferation financing.

**"VDA" or "Virtual Digital Asset"** has the meaning assigned under Section 2(47A) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, as expanded by the Finance Act, 2025, with effect from April 1, 2026, to include any crypto-asset being a digital representation of value that relies on a cryptographically secured distributed ledger or similar technology.

**"VDA SP" or "Virtual Digital Asset Service Provider"** means an entity engaged in any of the activities specified under the Ministry of Finance Notification S.O. 1072(E) dated March 7, 2023, including: (i) exchange between VDAs and fiat currencies; (ii) exchange between one or more forms of VDAs; (iii) transfer of VDAs; (iv) safekeeping or administration of VDAs or instruments enabling control over VDAs; and (v) participation in or provision of financial services relating to an issuer's offer and sale of a VDA.

**"WMDA"** means the Weapons of Mass Destruction and their Delivery Systems (Prohibition of Unlawful Activities) Act, 2005.
